copy.do_not_emit_subskillcandidate_when_taxon: Do not emit subskillCandidate when taxonomyMatch is false or matchStrength is weak.
copy.when_engineconfidencetier_is_t0_5_questi: When engineConfidenceTier is T0 (<5 questions), engineDecision stays insufficient_data.
copy.when_speedonlyrisk_and_mode_is_speed_mar: When speedOnlyRisk and mode is speed/marathon and accuracyBand is not clear_gap, do not infer knowledge_gap.
